name: execution_date
label: Execution Date
hint: Select NDA execution date

name: effective_date
label: Effective Date
hint: Select NDA effective date

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state where agreement is signed

name: nda_type
label: Type of NDA
hint: Select NDA type

name: retrospective_clause
label: Retrospective Coverage
hint: Tick if the NDA should cover disclosures made before execution

name: retrospective_start_date
label: Retrospective Start Date
hint: Select date from which prior disclosures are covered

name: disclosing_party_name
label: Disclosing Party Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: disclosing_party_address
label: Disclosing Party Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: disclosing_party_type
label: Disclosing Party Type
hint: Select type

name: disclosing_company_registration_number
label: Disclosing Party CIN / LLPIN
hint: Enter company or LLP registration number

name: disclosing_tax_id
label: Disclosing Party Tax ID
hint: Enter PAN, FEIN, or other tax identifier

name: disclosing_contact_person
label: Disclosing Party Contact Person
hint: Enter contact person for notices

name: disclosing_notice_address
label: Disclosing Party Notice Address
hint: Enter legal notice address

name: receiving_party_name
label: Receiving Party Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: receiving_party_address
label: Receiving Party Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: receiving_party_type
label: Receiving Party Type
hint: Select type

name: receiving_company_registration_number
label: Receiving Party CIN / LLPIN
hint: Enter company or LLP registration number

name: receiving_tax_id
label: Receiving Party Tax ID
hint: Enter PAN, FEIN, or other tax identifier

name: receiving_contact_person
label: Receiving Party Contact Person
hint: Enter contact person for notices

name: receiving_notice_address
label: Receiving Party Notice Address
hint: Enter legal notice address

name: permitted_employees_consultants
label: Permitted Employees / Consultants
hint: Define which employees, consultants, or advisers may access the confidential information

name: purpose
label: Purpose of Disclosure
hint: Describe purpose of sharing confidential information

name: confidential_information_definition
label: Confidential Information Definition
hint: Define what information is considered confidential

name: mode_of_disclosure
label: Mode of Disclosure
hint: Select how information will be shared

name: oral_disclosure_confirmation_period
label: Oral Disclosure Confirmation Period (Days)
hint: Enter the number of days within which oral disclosures must be confirmed in writing

name: obligations_of_receiving_party
label: Obligations of Receiving Party
hint: Define duties to protect confidential information

name: standard_of_care
label: Standard of Care
hint: Level of care required to protect information

name: exclusions
label: Exclusions from Confidential Information
hint: Information not considered confidential

name: confidentiality_period_months
label: Confidentiality Period (Months)
hint: Duration of confidentiality obligation, up to 60 months

name: term_of_agreement
label: Term of Agreement
hint: Select overall validity period of NDA

name: fixed_term_months
label: Fixed Term (Months)
hint: Enter fixed term duration in months

name: return_or_destruction
label: Return / Destruction of Information
hint: Conditions for returning or destroying confidential data

name: permitted_disclosures
label: Permitted Disclosures
hint: Situations where disclosure is allowed

name: non_use_clause
label: Non-Use Clause
hint: Restriction on use of confidential information

name: non_circumvention_clause
label: Non-Circumvention Clause
hint: Prevent bypassing the disclosing party

name: non_solicitation_applicable
label: Non-Solicitation Clause Included
hint: Tick if the parties want to restrict employee or customer solicitation

name: non_solicitation_period
label: Non-Solicitation Period (Months)
hint: Enter non-solicitation period in months

name: residual_knowledge_clause
label: Residual Knowledge Clause
hint: Tick if residual knowledge is permitted

name: breach_consequences
label: Consequences of Breach
hint: Damages, penalties, or legal actions

name: injunctive_relief
label: Injunctive Relief Clause
hint: Allow court injunction in case of breach

name: injunctive_relief_details
label: Injunctive Relief Details
hint: Enter specific injunction-related language or relief details

name: assignment
label: Assignment
hint: Select whether rights under the NDA may be assigned to a third party

name: severability_clause
label: Severability Clause
hint: Tick if the NDA includes a severability clause

name: waiver_clause
label: Waiver Clause
hint: Tick if the NDA includes a waiver clause

name: limitation_of_liability
label: Limitation of Liability
hint: Limitations on damages or liability

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Select governing law

name: governing_law_other
label: Other Governing Law
hint: Enter other applicable governing law

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction

name: disclosing_party_signature
label: Disclosing Party Signature
hint: Enter name as signature

name: receiving_party_signature
label: Receiving Party Signature
hint: Enter name as signature
